response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior engineer with genuine geospatial experience (founder of GISCollective, Green Map GIS work) and proven low-latency systems work handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic. However, that systems work was in DLang, not the required modern C++ or Rust; his commercial C++ experience is brief and dated (2014-2015), his recent years are dominated by TypeScript/Node web development, and he has no direct routing or navigation guidance experience. He could likely grow into the role given his demonstrated adaptability, but he does not currently match the core technical requirements.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map projects
Real low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic
Broad, adaptable engineer with strong testing/craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No modern C++ or Rust experience; C++ work is minimal and over a decade old
No routing, navigation guidance, or map-tile pipeline experience
Recent roles (2020-present) are web/product focused (TypeScript, React), far from systems-level pipeline work
